summary: Tested Phase A-D features: Workflow Builder, Marketing Dashboard (Referrals + Promo Codes), PDF Report Generation, AI Document Verification, Activity Logs, and Notifications. All 33 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Page lacks wrapper/padding - content starts at edge of viewport (no sidebar like other admin pages)

critical_code_review_comments: Activity Log page (/admin/activity) renders without the admin sidebar wrapper - it's a standalone page unlike other admin sub-pages. Consider wrapping it in the same layout as AdminDashboard for consistency.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed promo codes during backend testing (auto-cleaned where possible)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A-D features fully tested and working: (1) Workflow Builder - product selection, step CRUD, reordering all work; (2) Marketing Dashboard - referral stats, promo code CRUD, validation all work; (3) PDF Reports - sales, commission, partner-sales PDFs generate correctly with proper content-type; (4) AI Verification - endpoints work but require actual documents with file_path on disk; (5) Activity Logs - logs and stats endpoints work, UI shows 279+ activities; (6) Notifications - bell icon works, mark-all-read works. MOCKED: Notification emails/SMS are mocked to DB only.
